benchmarks.name: RAGTruth (ACL 2024)
benchmarks.note: Context-grounded RAG faithfulness; native citation path; no abstain on QA slice.

benchmarks.name: Needle-in-haystack (session)
benchmarks.note: Session append recall @ depth 30 (62 lines); Paul Graham-style needle.

benchmarks.name: LongBench-v2 (THUDM)
benchmarks.note: Short MCQ slice; 12k context cap / 32 corpus lines; 0.5B hybrid lm_patch. Human full v2 ~53.7%.

benchmarks.name: Scaling open (31Q targeted)
benchmarks.note: Valhalla open backbone-invariant; +6.5pp premium @ 0.5B vs trad RAG.

benchmarks.name: Scaling MCQ @ 0.5B
benchmarks.note: Hybrid lm_patch +50pp over trad prompt MCQ at same backbone.

benchmarks.name: MCQ ladder (Qwen lm_patch)
benchmarks.note: Rust sharded safetensors; 0.5B→3B hybrid MCQ scaling curve.

benchmarks.name: Backbone universality
benchmarks.note: Tier B native open vs trad_lm RAG across Qwen/Gemma/Phi.
